title: Geodis India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Geodis India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
